---
name: ✨ Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for this project
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: ['enhancement', 'triage']
assignees: ''
---

> [!WARNING]
> **REPOSITÓRIO ARQUIVADO**: Este projeto não está mais ativo e permanece público apenas para fins de estudo. Issues não serão respondidas ou resolvidas.

## 🎯 Problem Statement

A clear and concise description of what the problem is or what gap exists.

**Example:** I'm always frustrated when [...]

## 💡 Proposed Solution

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## 🔄 Alternatives Considered

A clear description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## 📦 Component Category

- [ ] New Component
- [ ] Button Enhancement
- [ ] Input Enhancement
- [ ] Link Enhancement
- [ ] TextBlock Enhancement
- [ ] Design Tokens
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Tooling/DX
- [ ] Other: \_\_\_

## 🎨 Design Mockups

If you have mockups or examples, please share them here.

## 📝 Additional Context

Add any other context, screenshots, or references about the feature request here.

## ✅ Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Criterion 1
- [ ] Criterion 2
- [ ] Criterion 3
